author: tbenr
content: I raised the same discussion in the past and potuz/mikhail convinced me that at the end it is fine as is

author: nflaig
content: yep that's argument to keep it at 8, increasing the limit in post-gloas is more costly as we want to keep the beacon block tiny

author: nflaig
content: there was an interesting scenario yesterday, we had a lot more attestations than blocks because Barnabas pointed both pyrms/lh validators to lodestar bn but we didn't implement compatible block production apis so we missed all blocks on these but attested fine, but even then, the 8 limit seemed fine, finalized at least. It seems only relevant if there are a lot of missed blocks but it seems not as likely that in the `index` will be different since you have a skipped slot in-between, so I don't really see how it could happen that nodes have a split view on the payload status while being on the same branch for multiple slots
